data.name: 夏樹的監禁生活
data.detailed_description:
劇本: tigerteeth

◆特色系統

　◇在環境設定裡能打開全CG模式,自由瀏覽HCG

　◇無壓力操作設計-快速的文字跳轉系統

◆故事

「…我到底做了什麼錯事呢？難道，就只是因為我窮，所以就該遇到這種事？」
「被關起來，被餵藥，被強姦。難道我活著的理由就是為了取悅男人？」
「快別這麼想吧，夏樹妹妹。發生在妳身上的事，絕不是妳的錯。」
「這些男人建立了國家，他們需要妳這樣的女人。妳會遇到這種事，是因為他們需要妳。」
「對妳來講很不公平吧。然而，妳難道不需要錢嗎？」
「在這裡靠身體賺錢，可比外面賺得快很多。妳不是有個弟弟在等著妳的救命錢？」

面對真由美淡淡的態度跟犀利的質問，夏樹無言以對。
歷經無數次的抵抗。
無數次的求救。
無數次的逃跑。
最終的結果，就是在不見天日的房間裡，不停地取悅男人。
而唯一的出口，則是老闆給他的口頭承諾。
賺到了老闆要求的天文數字，他就放夏樹自由。
但是，夏樹的內心燃起熊熊怒火。
她決定要蒐集證據，找到具有能力跟正義感的人，把這個邪惡的組織一樣打盡，跟弟弟重聚。
但是，她真能在不停地賣淫與服藥的循環中把自己解放出來嗎？

◆玩法

遊戲為第一人稱視角。玩家將扮演清貧女子夏樹，要透過自己的智慧在絕望的監禁生活找到希望，想辦法逃出賣淫地獄。

遊戲將分為兩個階段，
第一階段為絕望的監禁生活 ，夏樹將被囚禁在地下室，
白天面臨強迫【接客】，晚上被 ＂自願＂【吞藥】【侍奉】男人，
在暗無天日的黑道監禁下痛苦求生。

第二階段探索 AVG，夏樹必須使用：
【觀察】【思考】【交談】【接客】【勾引】【請求】【奉侍】
等指令討好真由美、鳥山、龍馬、老闆等四個主要角色，與探索黑道勢力不可告人的情報。
想辦法出賣身體迎合老闆，並忍受媚藥帶來的身體影響，接客賣淫增加信任度。
在過程中想辦法找到關鑑證據，一舉打擊犯罪勢力逃出淫窟爭取自由。

◆遊戲特色

◇遊戲CG: 24張, 包含差分300張以上

◇遊戲文字: 12萬字。
◇遊戲結局：5種

◇遊戲結局：5種
data.short_description: 與弟弟相依為命的貧困女子，為了給弟弟吃藥治病而被人監禁強迫賣淫，不停掙扎以脫身淫窟並將壞人繩之以法為目標監禁賣淫求生的故事。
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 日文*, 泰文, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0a
  • 儲存空間: 256 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Natsuki's Life In Prison
data.detailed_description:
◆Featured Systems

◇Full CG mode can be turned on in the environment setting, and HCG can be freely browsed.
◇Pressure-Free Operation Support one-click mouse operation-Fast text-to-text system

◆Story

“…What the hell was my mistake? Don’t tell me that such thing could happen to me, just because I’m poor?”
“Getting locked up, drugged, and molested. The reason for my existence isn’t to please men, is it?”
“Stop thinking like that, Natsuki. Things that happened to you are absolutely not your mistake.”
“These men built the country, and they need a woman like you. Such thing happened to you because they need you.”
“It’s not fair for you, right? However, don’t you need money?”
“Making money with your body here earns more than working out there. Don’t you have a little brother, waiting for the money that can save him?”

Natsuki was speechless in face of Mayumi’s indifferent and sharp question.
She had gone through such resistance.
Countless calls for help.
Countless escapes.
She ended up in a dark room, continuously pleasing men.
The only way out was the promise that the boss had said.
When Natsuki had earned as much as the hundreds of million dollars that her boss demanded, he will set her free.
But deep down in her heart, Natsuki was furious.
She decided to gather evidences, find someone powerful and righteous, wipe that evil organization out, and reunite with her brother.
However, can she really free herself out of the cycle of constant prostitution and drugs?

◆Gameplay Instructions

Playing as the first-person, player will act as the poor woman, Natsuki. Player will have to find hope in the desperate imprisonment life and find a way to escape the prostitution hell with their own intelligence.

The game is divided into 2 stages.
The first stage is the desperate imprisonment life, Natsuki gets locked in the basement.
During the day, she is forced to [attend the customers], while during the night, she “voluntarily” [swallows drugs] and [serves] men.
Try to survive in the dark prison, a world without justice.

The second stage of exploring AVG, Natsuki must use:
[Observe] [Ponder] [Converse] [Attend Customer] [Seduce] [Request] [Serve]
Wait for instructions to fawn on the 4 main characters, Mayumi, Toriyama, Ryuma, and the boss. Then, explore the hidden information of the underworld.
Find a way to sell your body and cater to the boss, endure the sex drugs effects on your body, attend to customers and increase your credibility.
During the process, try to find the crucial evidence, beat the criminal and strive for freedom.

◆Game Features

◇Game CG: 24, Including 300 different illustrated variants

◇Game script: 100,000+ Words.
◇Game Ending: 5 Endings

data.short_description: The poor woman who lives with her little brother. She is imprisoned and forced into prostitution for her brother’s medications, she keeps struggling to free herself from the prostitution and prosecute those bad guys with justice.
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese*, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Korean
*languages with full audio support
